creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 206718
Patch to update to 2.7.0

java/openjdk6 is about to be scheduled for removal.  This port is a dependency of java/jakarta-commons-dbcp, which only works under java/openjdk6 and must be updated.  Update to 2.7.0, which supports Java 8 and newer.  A dependent update to java/jakarta-commons-dbcp will be posted in a separate bug
